channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Private investor interest offers boost to Canberra United ahead of crucial A-League Women final
item.description: Canberra United are preparing for a pivotal A-League Women elimination final against Melbourne Victory at McKellar Park, with the match carrying added significance due to uncertainty over the club’s f...

item.title: Beganovic Departs TS Galaxy, Reflects Proudly on Achievements Amid Squad Challenges
item.description: Outgoing TS Galaxy head coach Adnan Beganovic has expressed pride in his three-and-a-half-year tenure at the club, despite leaving before the Nedbank Cup final. Appointed in November 2024 following Se...

item.title: The Origins and Conflict Behind GrapheneOS and CopperheadOS
item.description: Daniel Micay, a Canadian security researcher, co-created CopperheadOS with James Donaldson to enhance Android security. CopperheadOS gained attention for its 'hardening' techniques, which added layers...

item.title: Air Tanzania unveils special travel packages for AFCON 2027
item.description: Air Tanzania Company Limited (ATCL) is preparing for the 2027 Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) by launching exclusive travel packages for both local and international football fans. The event, which Tanz...

item.title: Africa strengthens AI and data protection rules amid rising stablecoin use in finance
item.description: As financial institutions across Africa increasingly integrate stablecoins into core operations such as treasury management and cross-border payments, regulators are stepping up efforts to strengthen ...

item.title: UK and France agree to deploy riot police on beaches to curb Channel migrant crossings
item.description: The UK and France have struck a new deal to combat illegal small boat crossings in the English Channel. Under the agreement, worth £662 million over three years, a 50-strong squad of French riot polic...

item.title: Cursor AI startup linked to Pakistani co-founder enters $60bn acquisition arrangement with SpaceX
item.description: Cursor, an AI code-generation startup co-founded by Pakistani-born entrepreneur Sualeh Asif, has reportedly entered into a major $60 billion acquisition arrangement with Elon Musk’s SpaceX, according ...

item.title: Former and current female premiers assess challenges facing Quebec’s new premier Christine Fréchette
item.description: Christine Fréchette’s recent appointment as Quebec’s premier has sparked discussion among current and former female premiers about the challenges she faces, particularly the concept of the “glass clif...

item.title: Tinubu Rejects Senators' Request for Automatic Re-election Tickets, Upholds Governors' Influence
item.description: On April 23, 2026, President Bola Tinubu met with the leadership of the Senate at the Presidential Villa in Abuja to discuss critical matters affecting the legislative body. During the meeting, which ...

item.title: Ticket and seating information for Charlie Puth's 'Whatever's Clever!' Manila concert
item.description: Charlie Puth is set to perform in Manila as part of his 'Whatever's Clever!' tour, and fans are eager to know the details on tickets and seating arrangements. The event will take place in 2026, and th...

item.title: Aaron Naughton taken off on stretcher after heavy fall during Bulldogs loss, avoids serious injury
item.description: Western Bulldogs forward Aaron Naughton was taken from the field on a stretcher after a frightening head-first fall during his side’s heavy 66-point loss to the Sydney Swans. The incident occurred lat...

item.title: Suspended Ekurhuleni police official and city manager face fraud and corruption charges in court
item.description: Suspended Ekurhuleni deputy chief of police Julius Mkhwanazi has claimed in court that his recent arrest is driven by political motives and personal jealousy. Appearing at the Boksburg Magistrate’s Co...

item.title: Tanzania to Host GCC-Africa Dialogue Focused on Jobs and Skills Development
item.description: Tanzania is preparing to coordinate an important dialogue between Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) countries and selected African nations, scheduled for October 5–6 in Dar es Salaam. The meeting is aime...

item.title: ADB commits $3.67bn to Pakistan in 2025, focusing on fiscal reforms, women’s inclusion and mineral sector development
item.description: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) significantly increased its engagement with Pakistan in 2025, committing $3.672 billion, marking a 22% rise compared to the previous year. According to the bank’s Annu...

item.title: Cultural Events in Kenya That Enhance Social Well-being and Unity
item.description: Kenya is known for its rich cultural heritage, with over 70 diverse tribes, each contributing to the country’s national identity. Cultural events play a significant role in promoting social well-being...

item.title: Forest fire burns part of Sierra Madre in Laguna; tourism suspended in Benguet due to similar incidents
item.description: Isang forest fire ang tumama sa bahagi ng Sierra Madre mountain range sa Kalayaan, Laguna noong Martes ng hapon. Ayon sa mga bumbero, nagsimula ang sunog bandang alas-4 ng hapon at tumagal ng humigit-...

item.title: Teodoro Challenges China's Accusations of Garbage Dumping in West Philippine Sea
item.description: Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. of the Philippines recently dismissed China's claims that the country is dumping garbage in the West Philippine Sea, calling the accusations baseless. During an ...

item.title: NDMA warns of intense heatwave across Pakistan until May 5; emergency measures activated
item.description: The National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) has issued a nationwide weather alert warning of a severe heatwave affecting Karachi and several other regions of Pakistan until May 5. Through its Na...

item.title: Astronomers use AI and GPUs to analyze massive space telescope data
item.description: NASA is set to launch the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope in September 2026, eight months ahead of schedule. The telescope is expected to produce 20,000 terabytes of data over its operational life, ...

item.title: Review of Bolu Essien’s Girls’ Hostel explores secondary school power dynamics, bullying and rivalry
item.description: Girls’ Hostel by Bolu Essien is a gritty and realistic drama series that takes a close look at the social hierarchy and power struggles within secondary school life. The story centres on Ufuoma, a new...
